mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wx_callback_task (uuid, json_content, type, status, retry_count, max_retry_count, create_time) VALUES (#{uuid}, #{jsonContent}, #{type}, #{status}, #{retryCount}, #{maxRetryCount}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM wx_callback_task WHERE status = 0 AND retry_count < max_retry_count ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE wx_callback_task SET retry_count = retry_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE wx_callback_task SET status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = #{oldStatus}
mapper.select: SELECT MIN(id) FROM wx_callback_task WHERE uuid = #{uuid}
SELECT MIN(id) FROM wx_callback_task WHERE uuid = #{uuid} AND create_time >= #{time}
